page_content:
GEOG650 MOBILE GIS (3 Credits)

This course covers how to create, test, and publish mobile GIS applications that work across multiple platforms (Android, iOS, and Black Berry Tablet OS) and adapt to a smartphone or tablet display. Prerequisite: GEOG657.

Restriction: Must be in Geospatial Information Sciences (Master's) program; or must be in Graduate Certificate: Professional Studies- Geospatial Information Sciences.
